The project targets net10.0 but doesn't have `<ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>`. That's why it's missing `using System.Threading.Tasks;` etc. This is a pre-existing issue. Let me check if the source files have explicit using directives.

Looking at OrderProcessor.cs, it has `using System.Text.RegularExpressions;` but not `using System.Threading.Tasks;` or `using System.Threading;`. It also uses `List<>` and `Linq` without importing those.

The project is missing implicit usings. Let me enable them since this is clearly a pre-existing config issue.
